name: DUDE Manager
description: DUDE Manager is a Windows PowerShell WPF GUI that configures, deploys, and monitors the DUDE automation engine, which dynamically synchronizes Intune device groups with Entra ID user groups. The sync runs in Azure Functions with a Managed Identity, supports transitive membership and nested groups, and includes safety rails (no shared credentials, prefix allowlists, blast-radius limiter, debug mode). The GUI handles deployment and monitoring, with ARM64 browser login for devices lacking WAM, and supports delegation features via Administrative Units and Defender tags.
author: Daniel Petri

securityCheck.aiSummary: No evidence of obfuscation, remote script downloads, credential harvesting, data exfiltration, malicious behavior, or hardcoded secrets in the provided code. The DUDE orchestration appears aligned with Intune/Graph usage. Minor risks include potential information disclosure from verbose startup/error logs and token handling occurring inside modules; ensure module signing, secure secret handling in App Settings, and RBAC controls are robust.
